name: Capital Gain Treatment for Lease Cancellation

eligibility.description: Applies to lessees receiving payments for the cancellation of a lease or distributors with a substantial capital investment receiving payments for the cancellation of a distributor agreement.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Amounts received by a lessee for the cancellation of a lease are treated as an exchange, allowing the payment to be taxed at preferential capital gains rates rather than ordinary income rates.
